title: FeatureFlagDtoThin
description: JSON Schema for Frontegg entitlements FeatureFlagDtoThin entity, derived from the published OpenAPI specification.

id.description: UUID string that represents the feature flag ID

name.description: String that represent the feature flag name

on.description: Boolean indicating whether the feature flag is on

offTreatment.description: Enum that represents the treatment in case feature flag is off

defaultTreatment.description: Enum that represents the default treatment

description.description: String the represents the feature flag description
description.example: This is a test feature flag

updatedAt.description: Date when feature flag was created

createdAt.description: Date when feature flag was last updated
